text: Standing in this modern corridor, peering into a glass-walled meeting room, I feel like an observer at the threshold of dialogue and creativity. There is a sense of possibility and order, but also an impersonal sterility. In the next space, the vibrant colors and words about research and development evoke curiosity and optimism. I sense a celebration of human curiosity and collaboration, and I feel energized by the promise of shared intellectual pursuit and innovation.
